positive.prompt: Build an accessible modal component with keyboard support
Refactor the dashboard into reusable components with sane state management
Rework the profile page into reusable components with proper state management

evals.prompt: Build a dropdown menu component for the design system.
evals.expected_output: An accessible, keyboard-navigable component following project conventions
expectations: Keyboard interaction and focus management are implemented, not just mouse clicks
ARIA roles or semantic elements are used correctly
Component state is managed deliberately rather than ad hoc
